mapper.select: select (select count(1) from ws_user) as userCount, (select count(1) from ws_product) as productCount, (select count(1) from ws_order) as orderCount, (select ifnull(sum(pay_amount), 0) from ws_order where status in (1,2,3)) as paidAmount
select p.id as productId, p.name as productName, p.sales as sales from ws_product p order by p.sales desc, p.id desc limit 10

select c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, ifnull(sum(case when o.status in (1, 2, 3) then oi.total_price else 0 end), 0) as amount from ws_category c left join ws_product p on p.category_id = c.id left join ws_order_item oi on oi.product_id = p.id left join ws_order o on o.id = oi.order_id group by c.id, c.name order by amount desc, c.id asc
